translations.vi: Cái ly có thể bị vỡ.
translations.ja: グラスが割れるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular determiner of the subject noun.
Neuter singular noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Modal auxiliary; 3rd person singular Konjunktiv II (present); expresses possibility and selects a non-finite main verb.
Infinitive main verb; separable compound verb (kaputt + gehen); complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Ohne Hülle kann es schnell kaputtgehen.

translations.de: Ohne Hülle kann es schnell kaputtgehen.
translations.en: Without a case, it can break quickly.
translations.fr: Sans coque, il peut se casser vite.
translations.it: Senza custodia può rompersi in fretta.
translations.ko: 케이스가 없으면 금방 망가질 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有手机壳，它很快就会坏。
translations.ru: Без чехла он может быстро сломаться.
translations.pt: Sem capa, o telefone pode quebrar rápido.
translations.he: בלי מגן הוא עלול להישבר מהר.
translations.vi: Không có ốp lưng thì nó có thể hỏng rất nhanh.
translations.ar: من دون غطاء قد ينكسر الهاتف بسرعة.
translations.nl: Zonder hoesje kan hij snel kapotgaan.
translations.uk: Без чохла він може швидко зламатися.
translations.hi: कवर के बिना यह जल्दी टूट सकता है.
translations.pl: Bez etui może się szybko zepsuć.
translations.el: Χωρίς θήκη μπορεί να σπάσει γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Uten deksel kan den fort gå i stykker.
translations.id: Tanpa casing, ponsel bisa cepat rusak.
translations.sv: Utan skal kan den gå sönder snabbt.
translations.ro: Fără husă, se poate strica repede.
translations.cs: Bez pouzdra se může rychle rozbít.
translations.da: Uden et cover kan den hurtigt gå i stykker.
translations.fi: Ilman suojakuorta se voi rikkoutua nopeasti.
translations.ja: ケースがないとすぐ壊れるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; introduces an adverbial prepositional phrase.
Feminine noun; accusative singular as object of the preposition 'ohne'.
Modal auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; selects a non-finite main verb.
3rd person neuter personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates speed/manner.
Infinitive main verb; separable compound verb; complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Die billigen Kopfhörer werden schnell kaputtgehen.

translations.de: Die billigen Kopfhörer werden schnell kaputtgehen.
translations.en: The cheap headphones will break quickly.
translations.es: Los auriculares baratos se estropearán pronto.
translations.fr: Les écouteurs bon marché vont vite s'abîmer.
translations.it: Le cuffie economiche si romperanno presto.
translations.zh-Hans: 便宜的耳机很快就会坏。
translations.pt: Os fones de ouvido baratos vão quebrar rápido.
translations.vi: Tai nghe rẻ tiền sẽ nhanh hỏng.
translations.nl: De goedkope oordopjes gaan snel kapot.
translations.hi: सस्ते हेडफ़ोन जल्दी खराब हो जाएंगे.
translations.el: Τα φτηνά ακουστικά θα χαλάσουν γρήγορα.
translations.nb: De billige hodetelefonene går fort i stykker.
translations.sv: De billiga hörlurarna går snabbt sönder.
translations.ro: Căștile ieftine se vor strica repede.
translations.da: De billige høretelefoner går hurtigt i stykker.
translations.ja: 安いイヤホンはすぐ壊れる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural determiner of the subject noun.
Attributive adjective with weak ending -en after definite article; agrees with the noun (nominative plural).
Plural noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Auxiliary forming the future; 3rd person plural present; selects an infinitive complement.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates speed.
Infinitive main verb; separable compound verb; complement of the future auxiliary.

sentences.target: Bei Wind kann mein Schirm kaputtgehen.

translations.de: Bei Wind kann mein Schirm kaputtgehen.
translations.en: In the wind, my umbrella can break.
translations.es: Con viento, mi paraguas puede romperse.
translations.fr: Quand il y a du vent, mon parapluie peut se casser.
translations.it: Con il vento il mio ombrello può rompersi.
translations.ko: 바람 불면 내 우산이 망가질 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 刮风时我的伞可能会坏。
translations.yue: 有風嘅時候，我把遮可能會壞。
translations.ru: На ветру мой зонт может сломаться.
translations.pt: Com o vento, meu guarda-chuva pode quebrar.
translations.vi: Khi có gió, ô của tôi có thể hỏng.
translations.nl: In de wind kan mijn paraplu kapotgaan.
translations.uk: На вітрі моя парасолька може зламатися.
translations.hi: हवा में मेरी छतरी टूट सकती है.
translations.pl: Na wietrze mój parasol może się połamać.
translations.el: Με τον άνεμο η ομπρέλα μου μπορεί να χαλάσει.
translations.nb: I vind kan paraplyen min gå i stykker.
translations.id: Saat angin kencang, payung saya bisa rusak.
translations.sv: I blåst kan mitt paraply gå sönder.
translations.ro: În vânt, umbrela mea se mπopeί să se strice.
translations.cs: Ve větru se mi může zlomit deštník.
translations.da: I blæst kan min paraply gå i stykker.
translations.ja: 風で私の傘が壊れるかもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a circumstantial adverbial ('in case of/with').
Masculine noun; dative singular as object of 'bei'.
Modal auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; selects a non-finite main verb.
Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Schirm'.
Masculine noun; head of the subject noun phrase (nominative singular).
Infinitive main verb; separable compound verb; complement of the modal.
